vibe: pure minimalism, data-driven, clean engineering, no-nonsense

layout.style: narrow single-column focus, stark borders, generous whitespace, pure minimal (no skeuomorphism)

ui_elements.cards: border border-zinc-200 bg-white p-6 md:p-8 rounded-none
ui_elements.buttons: bg-black text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors px-6 py-3 text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-widest
ui_elements.badges: border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-600 bg-zinc-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-wider

sections.name: Header
sections.design: Sticky top, bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md, border-b border-zinc-200. Minimal nav links (About, Experience, Projects) + Contact CTA.

sections.name: Hero
sections.design: Massive typography for Name 'Om Patel', smaller monospace subhead 'Data Engineer'. Focus on whitespace. Align left. 1px solid border separators.

sections.name: About
sections.design: Concise text. No fluff. 2 columns on desktop (Heading on left span-4, Text on right span-8).

sections.name: Experience
sections.design: Chronological list. High contrast Role title, muted Company (EllisDon) and dates. 1px border bottom per item.

sections.name: Projects
sections.design: Bento or linear list. Data Pipelines, Kafka, GCP focus. Display tech stack as minimal badges.

sections.name: Skills
sections.design: Grid of textual skills categorized (Languages, Cloud, Tools). No progress bars. Pure text.

sections.name: Contact
sections.design: Massive CTA block with 'Request Resume' button. Uses mailto link with pre-drafted subject and body.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements (nav links, buttons) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='nav-about', data-testid='resume-request-btn').

image_urls.description: Abstract minimalist wave texture - can be used as subtle hero background or project placeholder
Minimal office architecture - can be used as contact section accent image or omitted if purely text-driven

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML and Tailwind CSS for layouts. Avoid overusing Shadcn card components; instead use raw divs with stark 1px solid borders for a minimalist look.
Implement the mailto link exactly as provided in functionality.mailto_link on the 'Request Resume' button.
Load 'Outfit' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts and apply them in tailwind.config.js.
Do NOT use any skeuomorphic elements (no drop shadows, no bevels, no 3D effects). Pure 2D flat minimal styling.
Ensure all components are in .js/.jsx formats, not .tsx.
Make heavy use of whitespace and ensure strict mobile responsiveness.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, links, and forms.
